title: Cumin Broiled Steak
description: A simple and flavorful broiled steak recipe seasoned with cumin.

ingredients.name: Ground Cumin
ingredients.notes: Use fresh cumin for best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use kosher salt or sea salt

instructions: Season the steak with salt, pepper, and cumin on both sides.
Place the steak on a broiler pan and broil for 4-5 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches your desired level of doneness.
Remove the steak from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and serve immediately.
